description: Composition Magenta pink sweater made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool, has three quarter length batwing sleeves, wide boat neck with rib edging, plain cuffs, ribbed hemline and cable knit panel at top with sequins on front Fit Oversized Wash care Dry clean only Do not bleach Do not wrinkle Dry flat Cool iron when needed Turn heads while keeping warm with this oversized cerise pink sweater from arrow woman. Wear it as a dress over tights, or if you're heading out into the cold then pop it on over your jeans. The cable-knit collar with subtle purple sequins gives a very festive air to this fashion-forward piece. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
